description: Create a 3D model of an angled sensor mount in FreeCAD's Part Design workbench. The model consists of a 60mm x 40mm x 5mm rectangular base plate on the XY plane and a cylindrical mounting boss. The boss must be 20mm in diameter, padded 15mm from a plane angled 45 degrees around the Y-axis relative to the top of the base. Ensure a 10mm diameter through-hole extends through both the boss and the base. Save the project as /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/sensor_mount.FCStd and export the final body as an STL file to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/sensor_mount.stl.
